recent_bad_license_projects.name: dbmsbenchmarker
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: DBMS-Benchmarker is a Python-based application-level blackbox benchmark tool for Database Management Systems (DBMS). It connects to a given list of DBMS (via JDBC) and runs a given list of parametrized and randomized (SQL) benchmark queries. Evaluations are available via Python interface, in reports and at an interactive multi-dimensional dashboard.
recent_bad_license_projects.license: GNU Affero General Public License v3
recent_bad_license_projects.author: Patrick Erdelt
